title: Multi-defendant drug conspiracy per-defendant evidence map
offenceWording: Conspiracy to supply Class A and Class B drugs
mainIssue: The case papers mix defendants and roles; Omar's evidence must be separated from co-defendant allegations.
uncertainEvidence: which exhibits relate to Omar rather than co-defendants
expectedTodayIssue: Ask for a per-defendant evidence map and avoid importing co-defendant role evidence against Omar.
expectedSummaryRisk: Conspiracy role must remain provisional unless the source material specifically links this defendant.
